name: github-permalink-snippets
description: Render GitHub permalinks as code snippets in Markdown preview, like GitHub does in comments and PRs.

githubPermalinkSnippets.useVsCodeGitHubA.markdownDescription: Use VS Code's built-in GitHub authentication to fetch file contents. When enabled (the default), the extension reuses your existing VS Code GitHub session — no need to paste a personal access token. Run **GitHub Permalink Snippets: Sign In with GitHub** to create a session if you don't have one.

githubPermalinkSnippets.githubToken.markdownDescription:
Explicit GitHub personal access token used to fetch file contents. Overrides VS Code's GitHub session when set. Falls back to the `GITHUB_TOKEN` environment variable when blank.

Minimum scopes:
- **Fine-grained token**: `Contents` → `Read-only` on the target repositories
- **Classic token**: `repo` (private) — or `public_repo` if only public repos are needed
